title: Release delay, allow momentum
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for clearing the drag that makes financial tasks feel too large to start.
excerpt: A short energy statement from the MONEY program. The release names the habit of deferring; the allow opens to action feeling natural rather than forced.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 7 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the start of a session where you've planned to work on a financial task you've already deferred at least once.

content.text: A short energy statement for the specific drag that makes money tasks feel like they belong to a different, more capable version of you. The release clears the weight; the allow sets a new default.
I am ready to release the habit of delay around money tasks that feels heavy to start. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow decisive, confident action to feel natural and safe for me. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from the Week 7 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
